description: ...Power users are highly engaged with Spotify but express dissatisfaction primarily due to ad frequency and premium pricing, coupled with functional limitations such as the inability to edit playlist covers.
behavioral_signals: Great vocal. Easy to listen to and relate to
primary_jtbd: To reduce user friction by addressing ad frequency and premium pricing concerns in a way that enhances their overall listening experience without compromising on quality or engagement.
primary_pain: High ad frequency and steep premium pricing for power users, along with functional limitations like the inability to edit playlist covers.

behavioral_signals: Avoids using the app due to too many ads
Reports app crashes and errors frequently
primary_jtbd: To reduce ad frequency and improve stability to enhance overall user experience.
primary_pain: Constant ads, frequent app crashes, and glitches causing usability issues.
